back:
Streams individual desktop applications (not a full desktop) to a browser, fully managed, with automatic scaling of the underlying fleet.

Exam distinction from WorkSpaces: AppStream 2.0 streams specific applications to users (including external/non-employee users), while WorkSpaces provisions an entire persistent virtual desktop per user.

Managed persistent virtual desktop (VDI) service — each user gets a full desktop (Windows or Linux), unlike AppStream 2.0's single-application streaming.

Exam trigger: 'provide employees with a full, persistent desktop environment accessible from anywhere' points to WorkSpaces.
